title: Van Vihar Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Van Vihar Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Rajasthan

overview.short: Van Vihar Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area located in the Dholpur district of Rajasthan, India.
overview.description: Van Vihar Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area located in the Dholpur district of Rajasthan, India. Established in 1955, it spans approximately 26.6 square kilometers and is one of the oldest wildlife reserves in the region. The sanctuary is located about 16 kilometers from Dholpur city on the Vindhya Plateau.

topPlaces.name: Kesarbagh Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Kesarbagh Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area located in Dholpur district, Rajasthan, India. It was notified as a sanctuary in 1955 and covers an area of about 14.76 km².

items.note: Kesarbagh Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area located in Dholpur district, Rajasthan, India. It was notified as a sanctuary in 1955 and covers an area of about 14.76 km².

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Van Vihar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Van Vihar Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Van Vihar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Gwalior Airport (59 km) and the nearest railway station is Gwalior Junction (61 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Van Vihar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Van Vihar Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Van Vihar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Van Vihar Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Van Vihar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kesarbagh Wildlife Sanctuary.
